description: Fraudulent emails, websites, forms or messages that imitate trusted organizations to steal login credentials, OTPs, identity documents, payment details or install malware.
recommended_actions: Do not click suspicious links or open unexpected attachments.
Do not enter passwords, OTPs, UPI PINs, card details, Aadhaar or PAN on unverified pages.
Verify the website domain and access services through official apps or typed URLs.
Report financial fraud immediately by calling 1930.
Preserve emails, headers, URLs, screenshots, attachments and transaction details.

rules.name: Fake Login Page
rules.explanation: Directs the victim to a fake login page designed to steal credentials.
examples: Your account is locked. Login here to reactivate.
Verify your password using the secure login link.

rules.name: Lookalike Domain
rules.explanation: Uses a domain that looks similar to a legitimate bank, wallet, government or service provider.

rules.name: KYC Account Suspension Email
rules.explanation: Uses KYC or account suspension notices to push the victim to a credential-stealing form.
examples: Your bank KYC has expired. Update now to avoid account blocking.

rules.name: Attachment or Malware Lure
rules.explanation: Encourages opening a suspicious attachment or file that may contain malware.
examples: Open attached invoice and enable macros.
Download APK to complete customer verification.

rules.name: Bank Card or UPI Credential Form
rules.explanation: Attempts to collect confidential payment credentials through a phishing page or form.
examples: Enter card number, expiry, CVV and OTP to verify.
Submit UPI PIN to receive refund.

rules.name: Government Tax or Refund Phishing
rules.explanation: Impersonates Indian government, tax or identity services to steal banking and identity details.
examples: Income tax refund approved. Verify bank account details.
PAN verification pending. Upload Aadhaar immediately.

rules.name: Corporate Email Credential Theft
rules.explanation: Targets workplace credentials through fake IT, HR, email or VPN login pages.
examples: Your mailbox password expires today. Login to continue.
View salary slip by verifying your office account.

rules.name: Prize Reward or Cashback Phishing
rules.explanation: Uses fake rewards, gifts or cashback to lure the victim into submitting credentials or payment details.
examples: You won a gift voucher. Login to claim.
Cashback reward expires today. Verify card details.

rules.name: Urgency or Final Notice
rules.explanation: Uses deadlines, threats or penalties to make the victim act without verification.
examples: Immediate action required to avoid penalty.
